task_completion.description: Open the Thunderbird Settings or Config Editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Thunderbird's Settings tab is visible, showing the 'Language & Appearance' or 'Fonts & Colors' section, OR the Config Editor tab is open.

task_completion.description: Set the default font size to 24.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GUI, the 'Size' input field next to the default font is set to '24'. In the Config Editor, a preference like 'font.size.variable.x-western' is set to 24.
A 'Colors' dialog window is open over the Thunderbird settings, OR color-related preferences are being viewed in the Config Editor.

task_completion.description: Set Text color to Black and Background color to Soft Yellow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Colors dialog, the Text color block is black and the Background color block is soft yellow. In the Config Editor, 'browser.display.foreground_color' is '#000000' and 'browser.display.background_color' is '#ffffcc'.

task_completion.description: Disable the use of system colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Colors dialog, the checkbox for 'Use system colors' is unchecked (empty). In the Config Editor, 'browser.display.use_system_colors' is set to 'false'.

task_completion.description: Set the preference to always override colors specified by content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Colors dialog, the dropdown menu for 'Override the colors specified by the content with my selections above' is set to 'Always'. In the Config Editor, 'browser.display.document_color_use' is set to '2'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Thunderbird application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Mozilla Thunderbird interface, not a text editor modifying files or a mock application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration is done through Thunderbird's GUI or Config Editor, not by running commands on the prefs.js file in a terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target accessibility configuration requires setting the background color to soft yellow (#FFFFCC), text color to black (#000000), default font size to 24, disabling system colors, and setting the document color override to 'Always'. If using Config Editor: 'browser.display.background_color' = '#ffffcc', 'browser.display.foreground_color' = '#000000', 'browser.display.document_color_use' = 2, 'browser.display.use_system_colors' = false, and 'font.size.variable.x-western' (or similar default font size) = 24.
